European Natural Gas Prices Jump on Hormuz Escalation
headlines.summary: Europe’s benchmark natural gas prices opened 3% higher on Monday following the weekend escalation over the Strait of Hormuz which threatens LNG shipments out of the Middle East again. headlines.title: Oil and LNG Tankers Go Dark Again as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Oil and LNG tankers are back to switching off transponders when transiting the Strait of Hormuz as the latest escalation in the region and last week’s Iranian attacks on commercial ships prompted vessel operators to brave the chokepoint unobserved. Total tanker traffic collapsed

headlines.title: Oil Prices Surge 4% as U.S.-Iran Escalation Rekindles Supply Fears
headlines.summary: Oil prices jumped by 4% in Asian trade on Monday, following a weekend of intense U.S. strikes on Iran, claims from Iran that the Strait of Hormuz is closed to traffic once again, and Iranian strikes on five U.S. allies in the region. headlines.summary: Supermajors are set to report bumper profits for the second quarter thanks to the surge in oil and gas prices, driven higher by the hostilities between the United States, Israel, and Iran. headlines.title: Uruguay’s Offshore Oil Province Could Be Bigger Than Vaca Muerta

headlines.title: Britain Bets on Hydropower to Boost Energy Security
headlines.summary: After years of neglect, the United Kingdom has big plans for hydropower as part of broader plans for a green transition.
